## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:

Now that the data-processing is refined, I think the interface is in good enough shape for V1
increasing rtol for test slightly as failures occur on the boundary (rtol=0.5, sometimes test attains rtol = 0.55)


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented

title: Update Project.toml to v1
